title: Ubiquiti UACC-ETH-SP-DIN - Ethernet Surge Protector, for DIN rail
description: Ubiquiti UACC-ETH-SP-DIN is a Bidirectional Ethernet surge protection designed for DIN rail installation. It supports Ethernet speeds up to 10Gbps , including POE++ power delivery. Everything you need for installation is included in the package Device DIN rail Grounding cable M3 screw (2) Screw and wall plug
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Gigabit LAN Yes
